session_summary: Fixed P0 bug: Escape key breaking after closing overlay menus (stat menu, skill tree). Added overlay menu registration to UIManager to prevent pause toggle while menus are open.
done: Added RegisterOverlayMenu/UnregisterOverlayMenu public methods to UIManager
Guarded OnPauseInput and Update fallback with overlayMenuCount > 0 check
StatMenuController input switching now routes through UIManager.SwitchToUIInput/SwitchToGameplayInput
decisions: Used counter (overlayMenuCount) instead of boolean to support multiple overlays open simultaneously
Overlay menus still manage Time.timeScale directly (not through GameManager) to avoid adding a new game state for menu-freeze
RegisterOverlayMenu is called before time freeze, UnregisterOverlayMenu before input switch back
StatMenuController now uses UIManager for input switching (was using playerInput directly before)
next_steps: Playtest: Level up -> open stat menu -> press Escape -> verify menu closes cleanly without pause
Playtest: Open skill tree -> press Escape -> verify same clean close behavior
Consider centralizing Time.timeScale in GameManager for overlay menus (add a MenuOpen state) in a future pass
